name: @jhizzard/termdeck-web-chat-driver
description: CDP transport + render bridge for TermDeck web-chat panels (Sprint 72 / Workstream B). Attach a real, logged-in headful Chrome via Playwright (so the handle exposes a Page for selector work) and raw CDP (Page.startScreencast → client canvas, Input.dispatch* for human + programmatic drive-through). Interactive co-pilot automation, not scraping.
